name: Von Freeman
abstract: Earle Lavon "Von" Freeman Sr. (October 3, 1923 – August 11, 2012) was an American hard bop jazz tenor saxophonist.

interviews.title: Von Freeman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

concerts.label: Kool Jazz Festival: Goin' to Chicago
Weill Recital Hall Centennial Festival: Rhythm In Mind

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: I did a week with Von Freeman with my quintet... That was great, playing with Von on a nightly basis.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John Malachi
about_quotes.evidence: Bruz had a brother that played guitar [GEORGE FREEMAN] and his other brother plays tenor saxophone [VON FREEMAN]

about_quotes.speaker: Theodore Saunders
about_quotes.evidence: They have it right now, Von Freeman, he has his sessions out here.
